business.type_label: personal-brand blog / reputation & marketing consultant for entrepreneurs + bloggers

engine.ladder_reasoning: Visitor is deciding whether to trust a named person (Erika Madden) with their email based on her stated expertise and 11+ yr credentials — sells defined expertise, which sits first on the ladder. Not quick-yes because the page does real persuading (bio, blog excerpts, value prop) before the ask.

goal.one_action: Opt into the email list via the free 31-page ebook / free 21-day course lead magnet

structure.archetype_note: Content-led list-building personal brand. Books nav links off-domain to Gumroad (not crawled). Same hero + opt-in blocks repeat verbatim across pages (theme-wide sidebar pattern, not per-page content).

unmapped.observed: Homepage blog-post excerpt feed (5 recent posts)
unmapped.why_no_fit: No canonical 'latest-posts / blog-feed' section id; blog is a capability, not a homepage section, and these are not testimonials/socialProof/features

unmapped.observed: Resources page: 'Tools I Love' + 12 categories of affiliate grid-cards (tools, themes, gear, books)
unmapped.why_no_fit: An affiliate resource directory is neither features, pricing, catalog (not the site's own products), nor integrations; it is a curated outbound-link directory the taxonomy has no id for
map-hours capability is oriented to physical-place opening hours; this is virtual support availability with no canonical section

proposed_new.name: affiliate-resource-directory
proposed_new.evidence: Entire Resources page is 12 categorized grids of outbound affiliate recommendations — a distinct page type from catalog/gallery/portfolio

design_style.none_fits_because: Friendly first-person personal brand ('be delightful online', photo-heavy, light) reads warm/human rather than authority/professional despite the consultant framing.

confidence.why: fetch_quality is full, but the site is a legacy/unmaintained blog (footer '2014-2017', 'for 2017'), the off-domain Gumroad shop was not crawled, and repeated hero/opt-in blocks + mixed purposes (list-building + blog + affiliate directory + book shop) blur the single-conversion read.

gap_findings: Affiliate resource directory (Resources page) has no canonical section or capability fit — not features/pricing/catalog/integrations; forced to miscellaneous.
Homepage blog-post excerpt feed has no 'latest-posts / blog-feed' section id (blog is only a capability).
Office Hours / virtual support-availability has no section; map-hours capability is physical-place oriented, not virtual hours.
Multi-goal site: primary subscribe-follow (ConvertKit) coexists with secondary redirect to Gumroad book shop and affiliate redirects — taxonomy assumes one goal mechanism per site.
